message:
WMI-2 Type Confusion Leak: Field 'length' read through pointer of type move_desc in dmamove_finalize_pending(). This type is freed in dmamove_job_reap() without invalidating all references. If memory is reclaimed by a different type, this read leaks attacker-controlled data.
WMI-2 Type Confusion Leak: Field 'length' read through pointer of type move_desc in dmamove_finalize_pending(). This type is freed in vgem_dmamove_ctx_free() without invalidating all references. If memory is reclaimed by a different type, this read leaks attacker-controlled data.
